contents:
(** Quoting David Spivak:

    David: ok
       so an object of [FC ⇓ D] is a pair [(X, G)], where [X] is a
       finite category (or a small category or whatever you wanted)
       and [G : X --> D] is a functor.
       a morphism in [FC ⇓ D] is a ``natural transformation diagram''
       (as opposed to a commutative diagram, in which the natural
       transformation would be ``identity'')
       so a map in [FC ⇓ D] from [(X, G)] to [(X', G')] is a pair
       [(F, α)] where [F : X --> X'] is a functor and
       [α : G --> G' ∘ F] is a natural transformation
       and the punchline is that there is a functor
       [colim : FC ⇓ D --> D]

     David: consider for yourself the case where [F : X --> X'] is
       identity ([X = X']) and (separately) the case where
       [α : G --> G ∘ F] is identity.
       the point is, you've already done the work to get this colim
       functor.
       because every map in [FC ⇓ D] can be written as a composition
       of two maps, one where the [F]-part is identity and one where
       the [α]-part is identity.
       and you've worked both of those cases out already.
       *)
Context `{forall a b, IsHSet (Functor (S a) (T b))}.

Local Notation object_sig_T :=
      ({ a : A
       | { b : B
         | Functor (S a) (T b) }}).

goals.conclusion: {a0 : A & {b0 : B & Functor (S a0) (T b0)}} <~> object

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: {a0 : A & {b0 : B & Functor (S a0) (T b0)}} <~> object

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n object

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))
forall (s : A) (d : B), IsTrunc n (Functor (S s) (T d))

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n object

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))
forall (s : A) (d : B), IsTrunc n (Functor (S s) (T d))

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n {a0 : A & {b0 : B & Functor (S a0) (T b0)}}

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))
forall (s : A) (d : B), IsTrunc n (Functor (S s) (T d))

contents:
Lemma path_object (x y : object)
    : forall (Ha : x.(a) = y.(a))
             (Hb : x.(b) = y.(b)),
        match Ha in _ = X, Hb in _ = Y return Functor (S X) (T Y) with
          | idpath, idpath => x.(f)
        end = y.(f)
        -> x = y.

goals.conclusion:
forall (Ha : a x = a y) (Hb : b x = b y),
match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T (b y))) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S (a x)) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f x
    end
end = f y -> x = y

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion:
forall (Ha : a x = a y) (Hb : b x = b y),
match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T (b y))) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S (a x)) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f x
    end
end = f y -> x = y

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion:
forall (Ha : a0 = a1) (Hb : b0 = b1),
match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T b1)) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S a0) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f0
    end
end = f1 -> {| a := a0; b := b0; f := f0 |} = {| a := a1; b := b1; f := f1 |}

hypotheses.type: forall (a2 : A) (b2 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a2) (T b2))

contents:
Definition path_object_uncurried x y
               (H : { HaHb : (x.(a) = y.(a)) * (x.(b) = y.(b))
                    | match fst HaHb in _ = X, snd HaHb in _ = Y return Functor (S X) (T Y) with
                        | idpath, idpath => x.(f)
                      end = y.(f) })
    : x = y
      := @path_object x y (fst H.1) (snd H.1) H.2.

Lemma ap_a_path_object x y Ha Hb Hf
    : ap (@a) (@path_object x y Ha Hb Hf) = Ha.

goals.conclusion: ap a (path_object x y Ha Hb Hf) = Ha

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T (b y))) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S (a x)) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f x
    end
end = f y

goals.conclusion: ap a (path_object x y Ha Hb Hf) = Ha

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T (b y))) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S (a x)) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f x
    end
end = f y

goals.conclusion:
ap a
  (path_object {| a := a0; b := b0; f := f0 |}
     {| a := a1; b := b1; f := f1 |} Ha Hb Hf) =
Ha

hypotheses.type: forall (a2 : A) (b2 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a2) (T b2))

match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T b1)) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S a0) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f0
    end
end = f1

contents: destruct Ha, Hb, Hf; simpl in *.

goals.conclusion: 1%path = 1%path

hypotheses.type: forall (a1 : A) (b1 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a1) (T b1))

contents:
Lemma ap_b_path_object x y Ha Hb Hf
    : ap (@b) (@path_object x y Ha Hb Hf) = Hb.

goals.conclusion: ap b (path_object x y Ha Hb Hf) = Hb

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T (b y))) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S (a x)) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f x
    end
end = f y

goals.conclusion: ap b (path_object x y Ha Hb Hf) = Hb

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T (b y))) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S (a x)) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f x
    end
end = f y

goals.conclusion:
ap b
  (path_object {| a := a0; b := b0; f := f0 |}
     {| a := a1; b := b1; f := f1 |} Ha Hb Hf) =
Hb

hypotheses.type: forall (a2 : A) (b2 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a2) (T b2))

match Ha in (_ = X) return (Functor (S X) (T b1)) with
| 1%path =>
    match Hb in (_ = Y) return (Functor (S a0) (T Y)) with
    | 1%path => f0
    end
end = f1

contents: destruct Ha, Hb, Hf; simpl in *.

goals.conclusion: 1%path = 1%path

hypotheses.type: forall (a1 : A) (b1 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a1) (T b1))

contents:
Local Notation morphism_sig_T abf a'b'f' :=
      ({ g : Category.Core.morphism A (abf.(a)) (a'b'f'.(a))
       | { h : Category.Core.morphism B (abf.(b)) (a'b'f'.(b))
         | NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h o abf.(f))
                                 (a'b'f'.(f) o p_morphism_of S g) }}).

Lemma issig_morphism abf a'b'f'
    : (morphism_sig_T abf a'b'f')
        <~> morphism abf a'b'f'.

goals.conclusion: morphism_sig_T abf a'b'f' <~> morphism abf a'b'f'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: morphism_sig_T abf a'b'f' <~> morphism abf a'b'f'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n (morphism abf a'b'f')

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

forall (m1 : Core.morphism A (a abf) (a a'b'f'))
(m2 : Core.morphism B (b abf) (b a'b'f')),
IsTrunc n
  (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T m2 o f abf)
     (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S m1))

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n (morphism abf a'b'f')

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

forall (m1 : Core.morphism A (a abf) (a a'b'f'))
(m2 : Core.morphism B (b abf) (b a'b'f')),
IsTrunc n
  (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T m2 o f abf)
     (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S m1))

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n (morphism_sig_T abf a'b'f')

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

forall (m1 : Core.morphism A (a abf) (a a'b'f'))
(m2 : Core.morphism B (b abf) (b a'b'f')),
IsTrunc n
  (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T m2 o f abf)
     (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S m1))

contents:
Lemma path_morphism abf a'b'f'
          (gh g'h' : morphism abf a'b'f')
    : forall
        (Hg : gh.(g) = g'h'.(g))
        (Hh : gh.(h) = g'h'.(h)),
        match Hg in _ = g, Hh in _ = h
              return NaturalTransformation
                       (p_morphism_of T h o abf.(f))
                       (a'b'f'.(f) o p_morphism_of S g)
        with
          | idpath, idpath => gh.(p)
        end = g'h'.(p)
         -> gh = g'h'.

goals.conclusion:
forall (Hg : g gh = g g'h') (Hh : h gh = h g'h'),
match
  Hg in (_ = g)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T (h g'h') o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S (g gh)))
    with
    | 1%path => p gh
    end
end = p g'h' -> gh = g'h'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion:
forall (Hg : g gh = g g'h') (Hh : h gh = h g'h'),
match
  Hg in (_ = g)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T (h g'h') o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S (g gh)))
    with
    | 1%path => p gh
    end
end = p g'h' -> gh = g'h'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: gh = g'h'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

match
  Hg in (_ = g0)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T (h g'h') o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h0)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S (g gh)))
    with
    | 1%path => p gh
    end
end = p g'h'
forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
  (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0)

NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h1 o f abf)
  (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g1)

match
  Hg in (_ = g2)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h1 o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g2))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h2)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h2 o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0))
    with
    | 1%path => p0
    end
end = p1
forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
  (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0)

contents:
Definition path_morphism_uncurried abf a'b'f' gh g'h'
               (H : { HgHh : (gh.(g) = g'h'.(g)) * (gh.(h) = g'h'.(h))
                    | match fst HgHh in _ = g, snd HgHh in _ = h
                            return NaturalTransformation
                                     (p_morphism_of T h o abf.(f))
                                     (a'b'f'.(f) o p_morphism_of S g)
                      with
                        | idpath, idpath => gh.(p)
                      end = g'h'.(p) })
    : gh = g'h'
      := @path_morphism abf a'b'f' gh g'h' (fst H.1) (snd H.1) H.2.

Lemma path_morphism'_helper abf a'b'f'
          (gh g'h' : morphism abf a'b'f')
    : forall
        (Hg : gh.(g) = g'h'.(g))
        (Hh : gh.(h) = g'h'.(h)),
        ((_ oL (Category.Morphisms.idtoiso (_ -> _) (ap (@p_morphism_of _ _ S _ _) Hg) : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _))
           o (gh.(p))
           o ((Category.Morphisms.idtoiso (_ -> _) (ap (@p_morphism_of _ _ T _ _) Hh) : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _)^-1 oR _)
         = g'h'.(p))%natural_transformation
        -> match Hg in _ = g, Hh in _ = h
                 return NaturalTransformation
                          (p_morphism_of T h o abf.(f))
                          (a'b'f'.(f) o p_morphism_of S g)
           with
             | idpath, idpath => gh.(p)
           end = g'h'.(p).

goals.conclusion:
forall (Hg : g gh = g g'h') (Hh : h gh = h g'h'),
(f a'b'f'
 oL (idtoiso (S (a abf) -> S (a a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of S) Hg)
     :
     Core.morphism (S (a abf) -> S (a a'b'f')) (p_morphism_of S (g gh))
       (p_morphism_of S (g g'h')))
 o p gh
 o ((idtoiso (T (b abf) -> T (b a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of T) Hh))^-1
    oR f abf))%natural_transformation =
p g'h' ->
match
  Hg in (_ = g0)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T (h g'h') o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h0)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S (g gh)))
    with
    | 1%path => p gh
    end
end = p g'h'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion:
forall (Hg : g gh = g g'h') (Hh : h gh = h g'h'),
(f a'b'f'
 oL (idtoiso (S (a abf) -> S (a a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of S) Hg)
     :
     Core.morphism (S (a abf) -> S (a a'b'f')) (p_morphism_of S (g gh))
       (p_morphism_of S (g g'h')))
 o p gh
 o ((idtoiso (T (b abf) -> T (b a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of T) Hh))^-1
    oR f abf))%natural_transformation =
p g'h' ->
match
  Hg in (_ = g0)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T (h g'h') o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h0)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S (g gh)))
    with
    | 1%path => p gh
    end
end = p g'h'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion:
match
  Hg in (_ = g0)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T (h g'h') o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h0)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S (g gh)))
    with
    | 1%path => p gh
    end
end = p g'h'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

(f a'b'f' oL idtoiso (S (a abf) -> S (a a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of S) Hg)
 o p gh
 o ((idtoiso (T (b abf) -> T (b a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of T) Hh))^-1
    oR f abf))%natural_transformation =
p g'h'

goals.conclusion:
match
  Hg in (_ = g1)
  return
    (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
       (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g1))
with
| 1%path =>
    match
      Hh in (_ = h1)
      return
        (NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h1 o f abf)
           (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S (g gh)))
    with
    | 1%path => p gh
    end
end = p0

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T h0 o f abf)
  (f a'b'f' o p_morphism_of S g0)

(f a'b'f' oL idtoiso (S (a abf) -> S (a a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of S) Hg)
 o p gh
 o ((idtoiso (T (b abf) -> T (b a'b'f')) (ap (p_morphism_of T) Hh))^-1
    oR f abf))%natural_transformation =
p0

contents: destruct Hg, Hh, Hp; simpl in *.

goals.conclusion:
p gh =
(f a'b'f' oL NaturalTransformation.Identity.identity (p_morphism_of S (g gh))
 o p gh
 o (NaturalTransformation.Identity.identity (p_morphism_of T (h gh)) oR f abf))%natural_transformation

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: p gh x = (f a'b'f') _1 1 o p gh x o 1

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: p gh x = p gh x

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

contents:
Definition path_morphism' abf a'b'f'
               (gh g'h' : morphism abf a'b'f')
               (Hg : gh.(g) = g'h'.(g))
               (Hh : gh.(h) = g'h'.(h))
               (Hp : ((_ oL (Category.Morphisms.idtoiso (_ -> _) (ap (@p_morphism_of _ _ S _ _) Hg) : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _))
                        o (gh.(p))
                        o ((Category.Morphisms.idtoiso (_ -> _) (ap (@p_morphism_of _ _ T _ _) Hh) : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _)^-1 oR _)
                      = g'h'.(p))%natural_transformation)
    : gh = g'h'
      := @path_morphism abf a'b'f' gh g'h' Hg Hh
                        (@path_morphism'_helper abf a'b'f' gh g'h' Hg Hh Hp).

Definition path_morphism'_uncurried abf a'b'f' gh g'h'
               (H : { HgHh : (gh.(g) = g'h'.(g)) * (gh.(h) = g'h'.(h))
                    | ((_ oL (Category.Morphisms.idtoiso (_ -> _) (ap (@p_morphism_of _ _ S _ _) (fst HgHh)) : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _))
                         o (gh.(p))
                         o ((Category.Morphisms.idtoiso (_ -> _) (ap (@p_morphism_of _ _ T _ _) (snd HgHh)) : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _)^-1 oR _)
                       = g'h'.(p))%natural_transformation })
    : gh = g'h'
      := @path_morphism' abf a'b'f' gh g'h' (fst H.1) (snd H.1) H.2.

Definition compose s d d'
               (gh : morphism d d') (g'h' : morphism s d)
    : morphism s d'.

goals.conclusion: morphism s d'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: morphism s d'

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion:
NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T (h gh o h g'h') o f s)
  (f d' o p_morphism_of S (g gh o g g'h'))

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

contents:
exact ((_ oL (p_composition_of S _ _ _ _ _)^-1)
               o (associator_1 _ _ _)
               o (gh.(p) oR _)
               o (associator_2 _ _ _)
               o (_ oL g'h'.(p))
               o (associator_1 _ _ _)
               o ((p_composition_of T _ _ _ _ _ : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _)
                    oR _))%natural_transformation.
Definition identity x : morphism x x.

goals.conclusion: morphism x x

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: morphism x x

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

goals.conclusion: NaturalTransformation (p_morphism_of T 1 o f x) (f x o p_morphism_of S 1)

hypotheses.type: forall (a0 : A) (b0 : B), IsHSet (Functor (S a0) (T b0))

contents:
exact ((_ oL (p_identity_of S _ : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _)^-1)
               o (right_identity_natural_transformation_2 _)
               o (left_identity_natural_transformation_1 _)
               o ((p_identity_of T _ : Category.Core.morphism _ _ _)
                    oR _))%natural_transformation.
